title: Living Text Observatory scroll-narrative prototype (local-only design exploration)
objective: Design and verify an isolated, local-only, code-native scroll-narrative entry-experience prototype for Delta without changing the workbench, its scientific contracts, or production routing, and deliver an architecture decision proposal for a possible future integration.
scope: Isolated static prototype (semantic HTML, scoped CSS, minimal dependency-free JS, inline SVG) under prototypes/p016-living-text-observatory/

Creative direction, storyboard, design tokens, claim-evidence map, asset manifest, routing ADR proposal, measured browser verification, and independent five-role review under provenance/evidence/P016/
Configurable workbench CTA via meta tag; defaults to the production workbench root
non_goals: Merging to main, pushing, deploying, or changing production DNS/Caddy/nginx/container/systemd/TLS configuration
Revoking the P002/P004 direct-workbench decision (P016 is a reversible proposal)
Paid Higgsfield or any external asset generation; runtime third-party requests; new dependencies or fonts
Changing the scientific pipeline, catalog copy, tests, coverage, or any workbench behaviour

acceptance.criterion: Prototype is fully isolated: no workbench file, selector, test, or behaviour changes; full verify.sh remains green with identical totals to the pre-P016 baseline.

Every public sentence on the prototype is licensed by the claim-evidence map; the site/manuscript denylist yields zero positive violations; Public alpha and Experimental remain visible; 500 MFW is framed only as a pre-specified display reference.

Measured verification passes: zero horizontal overflow and zero sub-44px targets at 1440/1280/1024/390/375/320; zero console errors; zero third-party origins; no-JS and reduced-motion render the complete narrative; CTA visible in the first viewport.
Five independent review roles report no unresolved P0/P1 after adjudication.
Owner reviews the prototype and the routing ADR and records an explicit integration decision (publish under Option C, adopt another option, or archive).

commands.result: 1751 passed, 1 skipped; 11718 statements / 3056 branches at 100% measured coverage; schemas, 120 provenance records, repository scan, and R locks green; totals identical to the pre-P016 baseline (zero workbench regression)

commands.command: python p016_harness.py (local Playwright verification harness over loopback http.server)
commands.result: LCP 104 ms, CLS 0, 3 requests / 37,614 bytes total, zero third-party origins, zero console errors, zero horizontal overflow and zero sub-44px targets at 1440/1280/1024/390/375/320, no-JS and reduced-motion full-content parity (3,521 chars), one-way reveal persistence under fast/reverse scroll
